div.div:
API server
(etcd-backed)
CRDs (mxl.qvest-digital.com/v1alpha1):
• MxlFlow (Cluster)
• MxlFlowMirror (Namespaced)
• MxlReceiver (Namespaced)
• MxlDomain (Cluster, per-node)
• MxlNodeCapabilities (Cluster, per-node)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 540px; height: 1px; padding-top: 317px; margin-left: 632px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
mxl-operator
· Deployment, cluster-scoped, leader-elected
receiver.Reconciler: MxlReceiver → MxlFlowMirror × (target nodes)
flow / mirror / domain / nodecaps reconcilers are observer-only

div.div:
mxl-domain-agent
· DaemonSet, per-node
links libmxl.so
• fanotify watcher on /run/mxl/domain
• flowpublisher → MxlFlow.status (Origin)
• domainpublisher → MxlDomain.status

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 300px; height: 1px; padding-top: 682px; margin-left: 512px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
mxl-fabrics-gateway
· DaemonSet, hostNetwork
links libmxl.so + libmxl-fabrics.so + libfabric (tcp)
• SourceReconciler - FlowReader + fabrics.Initiator
transfer goroutine: TransferGrain on each HeadIndex
• TargetReconciler (idle on this node)
• capabilities.Publisher → MxlNodeCapabilities

div.div:
consumer pod
links libmxl.so
+ LD_PRELOAD libmxl-intent.so (initContainer copies the .so
into a shared emptyDir)
• openat() intercepted only for *.mxl-flow/flow_def.json

div.div:
mxl-domain-agent
· DaemonSet, per-node
links libmxl.so
• fanotify watcher (passive on this node)
• intent.Dispatcher - creates MxlFlowMirror on demand
• flowpublisher / domainpublisher

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 300px; height: 1px; padding-top: 677px; margin-left: 1372px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
mxl-fabrics-gateway
· DaemonSet, hostNetwork
links libmxl.so + libmxl-fabrics.so + libfabric (tcp)
• TargetReconciler - FlowWriter + fabrics.Target
publishes status.targetInfo (libfabric addr + memory keys)
progress goroutine: ReadGrainNonBlocking + OpenGrain.Commit
• SourceReconciler (idle on this node)
• capabilities.Publisher → MxlNodeCapabilities

div.div:
Host runtime
(per node, outside the Kubernetes API)
Linux kernel: tmpfs · fanotify (≥ 5.17) · raw sockets · /dev/infiniband
libfabric provider modules: tcp (in-tree); verbs / EFA / shm require additional host setup
